entries.summary: Phase 5 completed: 11 P1 Test Quality tasks. Fixed path traversal test verification, vector store behavior validation, health check assertions, TCP connection mocking, device validation with proper assertions, eliminated all try/except/pass patterns, removed dummy assertions, fixed test parser to use actual main.py parser, and completed Pydantic v2 migration. All tests now verify actual behavior with meaningful assertions.

metadata.plan_id: QA Findings Remediation — Document Q&A Assistant

lessons_learned: Tests should verify behavior not just types
Mock network connections to prevent real TCP calls
Remove all try/except/pass patterns that hide failures
Use actual module parsers in tests not copies
